message:
🐛 Add github.url for GHE OAuth in CD deploy jobs (#1461)

Both vllm-d and pok-prod deploy jobs were missing --set github.url=https://github.ibm.com
in their helm upgrade commands. Without this, GITHUB_URL env var is not set and the
console defaults to github.com OAuth, overwriting any manual GHE configuration on
each deploy.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -127,6 +127,7 @@ jobs:
             --namespace kc \
             --set image.repository=${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }} \
             --set image.tag=${{ github.sha }} \
+            --set github.url=https://github.ibm.com \
             --set github.existingSecret=kc-secrets \
             --set jwt.existingSecret=kc-secrets \
             --set githubToken.existingSecret=kc-secrets \
@@ -182,6 +183,7 @@ jobs:
             --namespace kubestellar-console \
             --set image.repository=${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }} \
             --set image.tag=${{ github.sha }} \
+            --set github.url=https://github.ibm.com \
             --set github.existingSecret=kc-kubestellar-console \
             --set jwt.existingSecret=kc-kubestellar-console \
             --set githubToken.existingSecret=kc-kubestellar-console \
